page_metadata.biocontainers__summary: An integrated pipeline for estimating strain-level genomic variation from metagenomic data
page_metadata.biotools__summary: Software designed to compute the theoretical isotopic distribution for molecules of known elemental composition. It computes for a molecule simultaneously two isotopic distributions: the coarse-grained isotopic distribution and the fine-grained isotopic distribution.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Software designed to compute the theoretical isotopic distribution for molecules of known elemental composition. It computes for a molecule simultaneously two isotopic distributions: the coarse-grained isotopic distribution and the fine-grained isotopic distribution.
